subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath acknowledged that which God hath acknowledged, on a Day wherein every secret was unveiled and every wise command came into being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اعترف بما اعترف به الله فی یوم فیه ظهر کل سر و برز کل امر حکیم
